\\\"events.emit\\\";\\n\\nexport interface CapabilityGrant {\\n  capability: Capability;\\n  granted: boolean;\\n  reason?: string;\\n}\\n\\n// ─── Module Health ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nexport type HealthStatus =\\n  | \\\"healthy\\\"\\n  | \\\"degraded\\\"\\n  | \\\"failed\\\"\\n  | \\\"disabled\\\"\\n  | \\\"blocked\\\"\\n  | \\\"misconfigured\\\";\\n\\n/**\\n * Trust level — how much should the system rely on this module right now?\\n *\\n *   built      — code exists, not yet exercised in production\\n *   verified   — passes its own health checks and probes\\n *   trusted    — verified + has recent successful operations (last-known-good < 24h)\\n *   degraded   — was trusted but is currently experiencing issues\\n *\\n * Modules self-report trust via healthCheck(). Core never overrides.\\n */\\nexport type TrustLevel = \\\"built\\\" | \\\"verified\\\" | \\\"trusted\\\" | \\\"degraded\\\";\\n\\nexport interface HealthReport {\\n  status: HealthStatus;\\n  message?: string;\\n  checks?: Record<string, boolean>;\\n  /** ISO timestamp of last status change */\\n  since?: string;\\n  /** Which module ID is blocking this module, if status === \\\"blocked\\\" */\\n  blockedBy?: string;\\n  /** When true, degraded is expected/normal (e.g. optional local server offline). Filed as INFO, never WARN/CRITICAL. */\\n  expectedDegraded?: boolean;\\n  /** Self-reported trust level. Modules that don't report default to \\\"built\\\". */\\n  trust?: TrustLevel;\\n  /** ISO timestamp of last successful operation (receipt-backed) */\\n  lastKnownGood?: string;\\n}\\n\\n// ─── Source Attribution ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n/**\\n * Universal footer for any recommendation, finding, or assessment.\\n * Every module that produces actionable output should attach this.\\n *\\n * source:        which module/system produced this (e.g. \\\"archelon\\\", \\\"crucible\\\", \\\"sibyl\\\")\\n * confidence:    how sure is the source? high = verified data, medium = inference, low = guess\\n * actionability: auto = system can act, suggest = human should decide, ask = needs more info\\n */\\nexport type Confidence = \\\"high\\\" | \\\"medium\\\" | \\\"low\\\";\\nexport type Actionability = \\\"auto\\\" | \\\"suggest\\\" | \\\"ask\\\";\\n\\nexport interface SourceAttribution {\\n  source: string;\\n  confidence: Confidence;\\n  actionability: Actionability;\\n  /** Optional: why this confidence level? Keeps the reasoning inspectable. */\\n  reason?: string;\\n}\\n\\n// ─── Module Contract ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n/**\\n * What does this module promise, and what happens when it can't deliver?\\n * Modules declare this statically. Core uses it for dependency health,\\n * degraded-mode decisions, and operator reporting.\\n */\\nexport interface ModuleContract {\\n  /** What this module guarantees when healthy (e.g. \\\"Routes model calls to cheapest available provider\\\") */\\n  promise: string;\\n  /** How to verify the promise holds (e.g. \\\"smoke test via /nous/models/:id/test\\\") */\\n  proofPath: string;\\n  /** What happens when this module is unavailable */\\n  degradedBehavior: string;\\n  /** Which team/person owns fixing failures (e.g. \\\"core\\\", \\\"jeff\\\", \\\"auto-recovery\\\") */\\n  failureOwner: string;\\n}\\n\\n// ─── Last Known Good ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n/**\\n * Tracks the most recent successful operation for a component.\\n * Receipt-backed — derived from receipt JSONL, not module self-report.\\n */\\nexport interface LastKnownGood {\\n  /** Component or module ID */\\n  componentId: string;\\n  /** ISO timestamp of last successful receipt */\\n  timestamp: string;\\n  /** What the last successful operation was */\\n  reason: string;\\n  /** How long ago in seconds */\\n  ageSeconds: number;\\n  /** Is this stale? (> 24h since last success) */\\n  stale: boolean;\\n}\\n\\n// ─── Module Dependencies ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nexport interface ModuleDependencies {\\n  /** Module IDs that must be present and healthy for this module to load */\\n  required: string[];\\n  /** Module IDs used if available, but not required */\\n  optional: string[];\\n  /** semver constraints keyed by module ID */\\n  versionRequirements: Record<string, string>;\\n  /** Module IDs that cannot be loaded alongside this module */\\n  incompatibleWith?: string[];\\n}\\n\\n// ─── Config ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nexport type ConfigFieldType = \\\"string\\\" | \\\"number\\\" | \\\"boolean\\\" | \\\"array\\\" | \\\"object\\\";\\n\\nexport interface ConfigField {\\n  type: ConfigFieldType;\\n  description: string;\\n  required: boolean;\\n  default?: unknown;\\n  secret?: boolean;\\n}\\n\\nexport interface ModuleConfig {\\n  schema: Record<string, ConfigField>;\\n  required: string[];\\n  defaults: Record<string, unknown>;\\n  /** Names of env vars this module expects for secrets */\\n  secrets?: string[];\\n}\\n\\n// ─── UI Contributions ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nexport type UIContributionType =\\n  | \\\"tab\\\"\\n  | \\\"panel\\\"\\n  | \\\"card\\\"\\n  | \\\"widget\\\"\\n  | \\\"settings\\\"\\n  | \\\"action\\\";\\n\\nexport interface UIContribution {\\n  type: UIContributionType;\\n  id: string;\\n  label: string;\\n  icon?: string;\\n  /** Sort order in nav */\\n  position?: number;\\n  requiredCapabilities?: Capability[];\\n  /** Reference string — NOT a direct import. Core resolves this at boot. */\\n  componentRef: string;\\n}\\n\\n// ─── Events ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nexport interface EventSpec {\\n  subscribes: string[];\\n  emits: string[];\\n}\\n\\n/** Base shape for all platform events */\\nexport interface PlatformEvent {\\n  type: string;\\n  moduleId: string;\\n  timestamp: string;\\n  payload?: unknown;\\n}\\n\\n// ─── Services ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nexport interface ServiceContribution {\\n  /** e.g. \\\"weather.current\\\" */\\n  serviceId: string;\\n  /** Interface name from SDK */\\n  interfaceName: string;\\n  implementation: unknown;\\n}\\n\\n// ─── Module Context ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n/**\\n * The object passed to every module's init() hook.\\n * This is the only way modules interact with core.\\n * Modules must not reach outside of ctx.\\n */\\nexport interface ModuleContext {\\n  moduleId: string;\\n  config: Record<string, unknown>;\\n  capabilities: CapabilityGrant[];\\n  /** Emit an event onto the platform bus */\\n  emit: (event: Omit<PlatformEvent, \\\"moduleId\\\" | \\\"timestamp\\\">) => void;\\n  /** Subscribe to platform events */\\n  subscribe: (eventType: string, handler: (event: PlatformEvent) => void) => () => void;\\n  /** Write a receipt entry */\\n  receipt: (entry: ReceiptEntry) => void;\\n  /** Register a service for other modules to consume */\\n  registerService: (contribution: ServiceContribution) => void;\\n  /** Consume a service registered by another module */\\n  getService: <T>(serviceId: string) => T | null;\\n  /** Log with module context attached */\\n  log: ModuleLogger;\\n}\\n\\n// ─── Module Lifecycle ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nexport interface ModuleLifecycle {\\n  /** Called once on first install only */\\n  install?(): Promise<void>;\\n  /** Required. Called with platform context. Module sets itself up here. */\\n  init(ctx: ModuleContext): Promise<void>;\\n  /** Required. Called after all modules are init'd. Module starts work here. */\\n  start(): Promise<void>;\\n  /** Required. Called on shutdown. Must release all resources. */\\n  stop(): Promise<void>;\\n  /** Required. Returns current health. Called periodically by diagnostics. */\\n  healthCheck(): Promise<HealthReport>;\\n  /** Optional. Called if module version changed since last boot. */\\n  migrate?(fromVersion: string): Promise<void>;\\n}\\n\\n// ─── Full Module Definition ───────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nexport interface SquidleyModule extends ModuleLifecycle {\\n  manifest: ModuleManifest;\\n  dependencies: ModuleDependencies;\\n  config: ModuleConfig;\\n  capabilities: Capability[];\\n  events: EventSpec;\\n  uiContributions?: UIContribution[];\\n  serviceContributions?: ServiceContribution[];\\n  /** What this module promises and how to verify it. Optional — modules adopt incrementally. */\\n  contract?: ModuleContract;\\n}\\n\\n// ─── Persona ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n/**\\n * A persona is pure data. It never contains code.\\n * It cannot change which modules load, which tools are available,\\n * or any platform capability. It is cosmetic all the way down.\\n */\\nexport interface PersonaConfig {\\n  id: string;\\n  name: string;\\n  /** Displayed in UI header */\\n  displayName: string;\\n  /** The system prompt injected at the start of every conversation */\\n  systemPrompt: string;\\n  /** Short personality description shown in UI */\\n  description: string;\\n  /** Optional CSS theme overrides — colors and fonts only */\\n  theme?: PersonaTheme;\\n  /** Optional greeting shown on fresh chat */\\n  greeting?: string;\\n}\\n\\nexport interface PersonaTheme {\\n  /** CSS custom property overrides. Keys must start with \\\"--squidley-\\\" */\\n  cssVars?: Record<string, string>;\\n  /** Display name for the theme, shown in settings */\\n  label?: string;\\n}\\n\\n// ─── Receipts ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nexport type ReceiptComponentType =\\n  | \\\"model-call\\\"\\n  | \\\"tool-exec\\\"\\n  | \\\"agent-run\\\"\\n  | \\\"module-event\\\"\\n  | \\\"capability-grant\\\"\\n  | \\\"capability-deny\\\";\\n\\nexport type ReceiptContext = \\\"production\\\" | \\\"benchmark\\\" | \\\"test\\\" | \\\"diagnostic\\\";\\n\\nexport interface ReceiptEntry {\\n  id?: string;\\n  timestamp?: string;\\n  componentType: ReceiptComponentType;\\n  componentName: string;\\n  moduleId: string;\\n  /** Human-readable reason this action was taken */\\n  reason: string;\\n  model?: string;\\n  tokensIn?: number;\\n  tokensOut?: number;\\n  estimatedCostUsd?: number;\\n  durationMs?: number;\\n  status: \\\"success\\\" | \\\"failure\\\" | \\\"warn\\\";\\n  /** Was the result shown to the user */\\n  surfacedToUser: boolean;\\n  /**\\n   * Execution context — distinguishes production calls from benchmark/test/diagnostic.\\n   * Defaults to \\\"production\\\" if unset. Benchmark and test failures must not be\\n   * escalated as production incidents.\\n   */\\n  context?: ReceiptContext | undefined;\\n  meta?: Record<string, unknown>;\\n}\\n\\n// ─── Change Summary ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n/**\\n * \\\"What changed since X?\\\" — the nervous system query.\\n * Receipt-backed. Feeds Sibyl, syscheck, Colloquium, /platform/trust.\\n */\\nexport interface ChangeSummary {\\n  /** ISO timestamp of the \\\"since\\\" boundary */\\n  since: string;\\n  /** ISO timestamp when this summary was generated */\\n  generatedAt: string;\\n  /** Total receipts scanned */\\n  receiptsScanned: number;\\n\\n  /** Counts by category */\\n  counts: {\\n    modelCalls: number;\\n    toolExecs: number;\\n    agentRuns: number;\\n    failures: number;\\n    moduleEvents: number;\\n  };\\n\\n  /** Failures grouped by component — the repeat-offender view */\\n  failuresByComponent: Array<{\\n    component: string;\\n    count: number;\\n    lastFailure: string;\\n    lastReason: string;\\n    /** true if 3+ failures from same component = repeat offender */\\n    repeatOffender: boolean;\\n  }>;\\n\\n  /** Model calls grouped by provider — spend since last check */\\n  spendByProvider: Array<{\\n    provider: string;\\n    calls: number;\\n    costUsd: number;\\n  }>;\\n\\n  /** Significant events — things a human should know about */\\n  highlights: string[];\\n}\\n\\n// ─── Error Envelope ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n/**\\n * Standard error response shape. Every error from any endpoint follows this.\\n * Monitoring keys on `ok === false`. Correlation via `requestId`.\\n */\\nexport interface ErrorEnvelope {\\n  ok: false;\\n  error: string;\\n  /** Machine-readable error code (e.g. \\\"MODULE_UNAVAILABLE\\\", \\\"VALIDATION_FAILED\\\") */\\n  code?: string;\\n  /** Additional context for debugging */\\n  detail?: string;\\n  /** Correlation ID from X-Request-Id header */\\n  requestId?: string;\\n}\\n\\n// ─── Runtime Mode ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nexport type RuntimeMode =\\n  | \\\"local-only\\\"      // No cloud providers. Local models only.\\n  | \\\"cloud-authorized\\\" // Cloud providers allowed.\\n  | \\\"forge\\\"           // Full lab stack. All capabilities.\\n  | \\\"minimal\\\";        // Pi/phone mode. Core + essentials only.\\n\\n// ─── Platform Events (well-known types) ───────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nexport const PLATFORM_EVENTS = {\\n  MODULE_LOADED: \\\"module.loaded\\\",\\n  MODULE_READY: \\\"module.ready\\\",\\n  MODULE_DEGRADED: \\\"module.degraded\\\",\\n  MODULE_FAILED: \\\"module.failed\\\",\\n  MODULE_STOPPED: \\\"module.stopped\\\",\\n  PLATFORM_READY: \\\"platform.ready\\\",\\n  PLATFORM_SHUTDOWN: \\\"platform.shutdown\\\",\\n  CAPABILITY_GRANTED: \\\"capability.granted\\\",\\n  CAPABILITY_DENIED: \\\"capability.denied\\\",\\n} as const;\\n\\n// ─── Logger ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nexport interface ModuleLogger {\\n  info: (msg: string, meta?: Record<string, unknown>) => void;\\n  warn: (msg: string, meta?: Record<string, unknown>) => void;\\n  error: (msg: string, meta?: Record<string, unknown>) => void;\\n  debug: (msg: string, meta?: Record<string, unknown>) => void;\\n}\\n\",\"lineCount\":445}],\"summaries\":[{\"imports\":[\"./index.js\"],\"exports\":[\"DEFAULT_MODULE_CONTRACTS\"],\"functions\":[],\"classes\":[],\"patterns\":[\"imports\",\"exports\"],\"summary\":\"1 imports;
